results.title: Bank Brothers Sustainable Ingredients Company Profile ...
results.snippet: Bank Brothers Sustainable Ingredients specializes in sourcing and producing high-quality edible animal fat products, including tallow and lard, entirely within Canada. They offer a diverse range of packaged and bulk products, catering to food companies and the restaurant industry, as well as applications in soap making, animal feed, and pet food.
